Land Registry.title: Land Registry
Land Registry.description: Search Hong Kong land records, register charges and deeds, and access the Land Registry Integrated Information System.

RVD.title: Rating and Valuation Department
RVD.description: Access property valuations, rates information, and government rent data for Hong Kong properties.

HKLII.description: Search Hong Kong property law case law including conveyancing disputes, tenancy appeals, and building management decisions.

Hong Kong e-Legislation.title: Hong Kong e-Legislation
Hong Kong e-Legislation.description: Official Conveyancing and Property Ordinance (Cap 219), Land Registration Ordinance (Cap 128), and Building Management Ordinance (Cap 344).
